summary: Tested PIN input masking with show/hide toggle on Login and Registration pages. Fixed React infinite loop bug in PinInput component caused by useEffect dependency on onChange callback. All core functionality working: PIN masked by default (dots), eye icon toggles visibility correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed infinite loop bug in PinInput.js - useEffect was calling onChange which triggered parent re-render, creating new onChange reference, triggering useEffect again. Fixed by using onChangeRef to store onChange callback.
PinInput component uses hidden input (opacity: 0) overlaying visual display boxes - this pattern can cause issues with some automated testing tools (fill() method)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PinInput component fixed and working. Uses refs to avoid React infinite loop. Test PIN input by clicking first input then using keyboard.type() or keyboard.press() methods, not fill().

Login PIN input masking.details: PIN digits masked with dots (•) by default

Login PIN toggle visibility.details: Eye icon toggles between Eye (hidden) and EyeOff (visible) correctly

Login PIN visible mode.details: Shows actual numbers (1,2,3,4,5,6) when toggled to visible

Registration Create PIN masking.details: Create PIN field masks digits by default

Registration Confirm PIN masking.details: Confirm PIN field masks digits by default

Registration PIN toggle.details: Both Create and Confirm PIN have independent toggle buttons

Aria labels.details: Toggle buttons have correct aria-label: 'Show PIN' when hidden, 'Hide PIN' when visible

data-testid attributes.details: All elements have correct data-testid: login-pin-0 to login-pin-5, login-pin-toggle-visibility, register-pin-*, register-confirm-pin-*

bug_fixed.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded - React infinite loop
bug_fixed.cause: useEffect with onChange callback in dependency array caused infinite re-renders when parent component re-rendered
bug_fixed.fix: Used useRef to store onChange callback reference, preventing dependency array from triggering on every render
